endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/locations/{location}/quotas
endpoints.description: Get the list of quotas at a location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/locations/{location}/quotas/{quota}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATION}} with a real location. Replace {{QUOTA}} with a real quota.
